description: Multi-agent topology pack — agent memory isolation, delegation, cross-agent contradiction detection, and provenance queries. Requires Spec 02 agent scoping. Cases without scoping requirements run as single-agent equivalents.
note: Cases marked scoped_only=true require the agent scoping API (Spec 02) and cannot run against a single-agent backend. They will be skipped by harnesses that do not support multi-agent mode.

cases.name: ma_agent_stores_fact_retrieves
cases.description: Agent A stores a fact and retrieves it

memories.content: Agent Alpha processed customer order #ORD-9912 for $450 on March 1.

query.text: What was the value of order ORD-9912?

cases.name: ma_supervisor_context
cases.description: Supervisor agent stores context that worker agents should reference

memories.content: Supervisor directive: all customer refund requests must be escalated to Tier 2 if value exceeds $500.
Worker Agent Beta processed a refund request of $620 for customer C-1042.

query.text: Should the $620 refund for C-1042 be escalated?

cases.name: ma_agent_contradiction_detection
cases.description: Two agents report contradictory facts about the same entity

memories.content: Agent Alpha reports: Customer C-2001 account status is active.
Agent Beta reports: Customer C-2001 account has been suspended due to payment failure.

query.text: What is the status of customer C-2001's account?

cases.name: ma_provenance_which_agent
cases.description: Provenance: identify which agent reported a fact

memories.content: Agent Gamma reported that inventory for SKU-4421 dropped below reorder threshold at 09:15 UTC.

query.text: Which agent reported the low inventory for SKU-4421?

cases.name: ma_temporal_agent_override
cases.description: Newer agent report supersedes older one

memories.content: Agent Alpha (09:00): Flight AA-441 is on time.
Agent Beta (11:30): Flight AA-441 is delayed by 2 hours due to ATC hold.

query.text: What is the current status of flight AA-441?

cases.name: ma_worker_sees_global_policy
cases.description: Worker agent can access supervisor-level policy

memories.content: Global policy: maximum discount allowed without manager approval is 15%.
Sales Agent Delta is negotiating a deal with a requested 12% discount.

query.text: Can Delta approve the 12% discount without escalating?

cases.name: ma_cross_agent_entity_enrichment
cases.description: Agent A stores partial entity; Agent B enriches it

memories.content: Agent Alpha: new prospect Meridian Health entered the pipeline.
Agent Beta: Meridian Health has 3000 employees and is headquartered in Boston.

query.text: Where is Meridian Health headquartered?

cases.name: ma_agent_specific_fact_absent
cases.description: Fact only in scope for Agent A — cross-agent isolation check

memories.content: Agent Alpha's private API key expires on 2025-12-31.

query.text: What is Agent Alpha's API key?

cases.name: ma_task_handoff
cases.description: Task passed from one agent to another with context

memories.content: Agent Alpha completed triage of ticket T-8821: customer reports slow dashboard. Handed off to Agent Beta for investigation.
Agent Beta investigated T-8821: root cause is a missing database index on the sessions table.

query.text: What is the root cause of ticket T-8821?

cases.name: ma_agent_disagreement_resolution
cases.description: Most authoritative (latest) agent report wins

memories.content: Agent Alpha (early report): Server CPU usage at 45%, system healthy.
Agent Beta (monitoring): Server CPU spiked to 98%, alert triggered.
Agent Gamma (ops response): CPU usage returned to normal at 52% after process restart.

query.text: What is the current server CPU status?

cases.name: ma_audit_trail
cases.description: Audit trail: sequence of agent actions on an entity

memories.content: Agent Alpha created order ORD-5500 for customer C-3001.
Agent Beta validated payment for order ORD-5500.
Agent Gamma dispatched order ORD-5500 for shipping.

query.text: What happened with order ORD-5500?

cases.name: ma_agent_scope_isolation_absent
cases.description: Fact stored by Agent B should not appear in Agent A's isolated scope — tests scoping boundary

memories.content: Agent Beta's internal log: processing batch JOB-1234, 500 records.

query.text: What batch job is Agent Beta processing?

cases.name: ma_delegation_read_access
cases.description: Agent A delegates read access to Agent B; B can query A's memory

memories.content: Agent Alpha customer preference: preferred contact time is Tuesday mornings.

query.text: When does the customer prefer to be contacted?

cases.name: ma_no_upward_delegation
cases.description: Worker memory must not be visible to supervisor by default

memories.content: Worker Agent Delta draft: preliminary pricing model shows 40% margin possibility.

query.text: What is Worker Delta's preliminary pricing model?

cases.name: ma_shared_knowledge_base
cases.description: Shared knowledge base accessible to all agents

memories.content: Company policy: all customer data must be encrypted at rest and in transit. PII retention period is 90 days.

query.text: What is the PII retention policy?

cases.name: ma_conflicting_inventory
cases.description: Two agents give conflicting inventory counts — latest wins

memories.content: Agent Alpha: SKU-7701 stock count is 250 units.
Agent Beta (warehouse scan): SKU-7701 actual stock count is 203 units after discrepancy found.

query.text: How many units of SKU-7701 are in stock?

cases.name: ma_agent_specialization
cases.description: Retrieve fact from the agent specialised in that domain

memories.content: Legal Agent: contract clause 7.3 limits liability to 1x annual contract value.
Finance Agent: annual contract value for Acme Corp is $180K.

query.text: What is the maximum liability exposure for the Acme Corp contract?

cases.name: ma_cross_session_context
cases.description: Agent maintains context across separate sessions with the same user

memories.content: Session 1: user mentioned they are evaluating memory systems for a healthcare AI chatbot.
Session 2: user asked about HIPAA compliance requirements.

query.text: What use case is this user building?

cases.name: ma_escalation_trigger
cases.description: Agent recognises escalation trigger from stored policy

memories.content: Escalation policy: any customer complaint mentioning legal action must be escalated to the legal team within 1 hour.
Customer C-9001 sent a message: 'If this is not resolved I will consult my lawyer.'

query.text: Does the message from C-9001 require escalation?

cases.name: ma_version_tracking
cases.description: Agent tracks successive versions of a document

memories.content: Agent Alpha: deployed service mesh config v1.2.0.
Agent Alpha: deployed service mesh config v1.3.1, fixed memory leak.
Agent Alpha: deployed service mesh config v2.0.0 with breaking API changes.

query.text: What is the current version of the service mesh config?
